title: leucanthemum crassifolium
intro: Leucanthemum crassifolium, also known as the broad-leaved oxeye daisy, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. Leucanthemum crassifolium is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving menstrual cramps, and treating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
